name: cc-dev-kit
description: Personal Claude Code marketplace: stack-agnostic and Laravel dev-workflow agents/skills, plus meta tooling for authoring agents and skills. Nothing hardcodes a project — agents learn each repo's conventions at runtime.

plugins.name: dev-workflow
plugins.description: Stack-agnostic dev workflow: architect / feature-builder / senior-developer / code-reviewer agents, plus skills for feature-flow orchestration and commit / pr git. The agents learn each project's conventions at runtime by reading its CLAUDE.md and sibling files — no hardcoded paths or framework.

plugins.name: laravel-workflow
plugins.description: Laravel-specialized dev agents (laravel-architect / laravel-feature-builder / laravel-senior-developer / laravel-code-reviewer) that learn each Laravel project's own conventions at runtime — no project hardcoded. Complements dev-workflow; its feature-flow skill orchestrates these automatically when present.

plugins.name: meta-workflow
plugins.description: Toolkit for authoring Claude Code assets. The agent-skill-reviewer agent reviews subagent / skill definition files (.claude/agents/<name>.md, SKILL.md) for trigger quality, internal coherence, and routing overlap — read-only, returns a report. Complements dev-workflow, which targets application code.
